home__description: Love life, love work, and stay curious about the unknown.
about__description: ● Possesses solid art expertise with a systematic and in-depth understanding of the full art pipeline in game development. Proficient in every stage from early design to final implementation, including production standards and development cycles. Has a keen eye for game art styles and can quickly understand and adapt to different project art directions and visual requirements.</br>

● Focused on game art creation and visual implementation, deeply rooted in full-pipeline art production. Has held positions including scene modeler, level artist, and technical artist, with extensive cross-role practical experience. Skilled at scene art and project engineering management, finding the balance between art quality, project efficiency, and technical solutions.</br>

● Demonstrates strong communication and collaboration skills with a high sense of responsibility. Patient, meticulous, and rigorous in work. Adept at efficiently communicating technical implementation plans with designers and programmers, finding a reasonable balance between visual quality and performance overhead. Actively receives requirements and feedback, and continuously optimizes art output during project iterations to ensure final delivery quality.</br>

● Has strong self-planning ability and proactive learning mindset, with outstanding time management and execution skills. Capable of efficiently driving both personal and team tasks. Also possesses good project risk awareness, able to anticipate potential issues in production and implementation stages to ensure stable project progress.
qualification4__subtitle: 3D scene modeling, mainly producing cel-shaded scenes and hand-painted scene model textures.
qualification5__subtitle: 1. Produced 3D hand-painted, next-gen, and cel-shaded scenes; reviewed and revised internal file submissions for quality.</br>
2. Responsible for liaising with client requirements, project scheduling and task allocation, quality review, and scene content production.</br>
3. Managed school-enterprise cooperation, on-campus facilities, and intern training.</br>
Ridge Racer, Datang Wushuang, Wuhun, Zhanhun, Zhenmoqu,erta
qualification6__subtitle: 1. Produced 3D hand-painted scenes, cel-shaded scenes, and renderings; reviewed and revised internal file submissions for quality.</br>
2. Responsible for liaising with client requirements, team management, project scheduling, and internal quality review.</br>
qualification7__subtitle: 2. Game level map production, lighting baking, collaborating with TA and programmers on material effects and logic.</br>
3. Drove scene-related optimization and technical follow-up in project optimization.</br>
4. Shader development, material interaction logic, art tool development, and art production pipeline standardization.</br>
portfolio1__description: A portfolio exploring the intersection of art and technology. The subpage showcases my work across different engines and modules, including both project work and personal exercises.
portfolio2__description: Level map designs of various types and theme styles from projects and exercises.
portfolio3__description: Rendered map effects from past projects, featuring high-quality maps produced using V-Ray.
portfolio4__description: 3D models in various styles and themes, demonstrating my ability to handle different styles, proportions, and details in scene modeling.
